# External repositories

This directory reserves destinations for pinned source repositories. External repositories are not initialized, cloned, or managed during the scaffolding phase.

- `libero/`: pinned LIBERO clone used by the initial benchmark adapter.
- `openvla/`: pinned upstream OpenVLA clone used by the Vanilla and LoRA policy services.
- `openvla-oft/`: pinned upstream OFT clone with a small OVLAB integration layer.
- `openvla-quic/`: dedicated OpenVLA-QuIC fork containing the architectural QuIC modifications.
